name: DevOps & GCP Infrastructure
description: Eight books equipping Brent (DevOps/GCP agent) with source material for GCP operations, CI/CD, infrastructure as code, and SOC 2 controls. Covers cloud-native security (Armitage), GCP in depth (Blum, Kanjani), DevSecOps practices and tooling (Suehring), serverless security across AWS/Azure/GCP (Lat), Terraform IaC on GCP (Wang), SOC 2 compliance (SecuriCheck), and the foundational DevOps Handbook (Kim et al.).
use_cases: Understanding GCP services and deployment patterns for production workloads
Implementing DevSecOps practices and shift-left security in CI/CD pipelines
Provisioning and managing GCP infrastructure with Terraform
Assessing and remediating serverless security risks on AWS, Azure, and GCP
Working towards or auditing SOC 2 compliance for cloud-hosted SaaS products
